h1d08262dg765cg4839g86d0gb114ae07f099: We need to move. No point staying here - twiddling our thumbs.
h23550d2eg3ae5g4664g90bag765f4ec4a3fd: I'd best see you in Baldur's Gate.
hb559e636g2bd9g4b65g90a5g246b631ff987: Used to think the goblins'd kill us the second we set foot outside. But after hearing what you did at the gate...
hd09837c0g006cg4c13gae6dgcdcf83cca85f: ... well, I still think they'll kill us. But at least we can put up a fight.
h229baa63g3eb5g4fbcg909dgdf2e72674486: Not with that attitude. Fight and win!
h030f54e2g7075g49b4ga910gfa830252d258: Try not to keel over with the first blade drawn.
ha9e015ffg5f20g4945g9458g7ab528cb371c: Well, we came through Avernus. We might not look it, but we're tough.
ha163ba09ge592g4b03g9f45gfbec59f61775: Who knows, some of us might even make it to Baldur's Gate.
h5a115ba8g6ee5g415fga02egaef8fa46cf49: If you survived the Hells, you'll survive this.
h47a3756fg067fg45c7g9fd2g25c595e1a509: There's optimism and then there's stupid, hun.
h3b97d738g2908g4d17g83dagd0ee4aa227bd: Plenty of us fell to monsters already. I don't see the rest of us lasting long out there.
h4e4f8a53g3b62g4e04gbc62g75b4df6cb1b7: But if you're so sure we will, why not put a little gold on the line?
h7ea475c1gac06g4f54g8d1fg6dd74e14f9af: Maybe you'll catch a glimpse of Baldur's Gate before they cut you down.
h2a05050bg17bcg49a1g9d8eg18d7453c3e38: Ohh, well aren't you an optimist?
haf55df39ge8eeg4584g93c1g9223b13407bd: I've seen what the goblins can do to a vulnerable caravan, so I'm not as confident.
h70916c77gc225g4b3fga5ddg423de08378b1: But if you are, why not put a little gold on the line? ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
haab3f9fdgc94fg4de2gb01ag7078f1ffcb26: You have an odd sense of humour. This isn't really funny.
ha300ceb2gaea2g41f1gb11ag022be4f98d5a: No, it's not. None of this is funny. But at least this way there's something to play for.
hd3fa1de1gb3f7g48f8gb30eg69efa6cc685a: Come on. What do you say?
h588a3589gbd85g456bgad55g597c68516e3e: How are you going to take my gold if you're dead?
he205c68ega4e9g4b1cg85f9g8c93c3b52c9a: I'm sure you're good for it. Just leave the gold on my corpse.
hac23709cgd7cfg4470ga76dgcce91b0bf328: After seeing you at the gate, I'm sure you'll last longer than us.
h4458ec1dgceafg4dbbg8057g1403b934acef: No, I won't waste my time.
h3ac1eb65g9991g49fegb2b5g3da88113dfd7: Excellent! I'll meet you in Baldur's Gate when this is all over. I can pay you then.
h1b22df3egee6cg4c2ag8351g5dcdeb902791: No? Shame, I thought you might enjoy a little fun.
hd6fbd7c1g2c5fg4f2cgaa74gfc3b97b9bf1c: Be safe out there, whatever comes your way.
hbb6e4607g3d54g446cgbc62g27eeaec7de8b: With trained worgs on your scent? Not likely.
h44e4fab8g798ag4019ga2a9g5026a4f73fe8: You are just a ray of sunshine, aren't you?
h21503230g68d2g4850gb1b9ga0bfd18681db: Thanks for your helpful feedback, but I think we're done here.
h780d3df5g3e4dg45bdgbb2aga41dfa86796c: Will you? I don't see many soldiers.
hcec1f1ceg45e9g42ceg8dafge91381410733: We're tougher than we look. We've survived persecution. Survived Avernus.
h789da3f9gcc62g4094gbd16g052076af435d: A defeat is a defeat. There is no glory in that.
h736e8e9eg123cg4270g8020g64bd66db7ee8: It's taking a really bleak situation and trying to find some light in it.
h663bbc34g2ad3g49c7gbe0ag9e77cee8e58d: Even if the light is just as bleak as everything else, and...
h5aa8bcc5g02feg4f23gbabfg9bc97d6df76f: ...you know what? Never mind. It wasn't that funny.
h96afeb5cg64cdg4a96g8b74gce4f525864a4: No. No, I suppose it isn't.
